image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about the spacing effect than social media does.
Context visual: The spacing effect suggests that spreading out learning over time leads to better retention.
Escalation visual: Yet, many believe cramming works just as well. But does it really?
Evidence visual: Research shows spaced learning can enhance memory recall by over 50%.
Payoff visual: So, next time you study, try breaking it up! Your brain will thank you.
Cta visual: Curious for more science tips? Hit subscribe!
